title: gilia gilioides subsp. volcanica
intro: Gilia gilioides subsp. volcanica is a sub-species of plant belonging to the genus Gilia, commonly known as gilia or gilia gilioides, which is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Gilia gilioides subsp. volcanica include its potential to help treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Gilia gilioides subsp. volcanica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
